summary: Russian forces used FPV drones to down a Ka-52 helicopter near Nadiivka, Donetsk, and then struck the crew during their attempted evacuation. In Sumy region, an FPV drone destroyed a Ukrainian modernized armored tractor BTS-4. On the Kupyansk direction, a fiber-optic FPV drone "Provod" eliminated a Ukrainian BMP-1LB, while another drone destroyed a nearby pickup truck. Ukrainian forces in Kostiantynivka survived an FPV drone attack, with one soldier seen holding a drone detector. In Kharkiv region, FPV drones struck a Ukrainian UAV control post in Karachne. Russian units "Rubikon" reported 114 targets eliminated on March 26 and 127 on March 25 across multiple directions. A developer confirmed that kinetic interception remains functional for the "Yolka" anti-aircraft drone after impact. China is developing the ATLAS system using 96 Switchblade-like UAVs in swarm formations.
